## Summary

Describe the feature in one or two sentences.

## Problem

What user problem does this solve?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the behavior you want.

## Scope

- [ ] Frontend only
- [ ] Backend only
- [ ] Both frontend and backend
- [ ] Documentation

## Chemistry / Workflow Context

If relevant, explain the chemistry or research workflow this feature supports.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any other approaches you considered.

## Additional Context

Add references, screenshots, mockups, links, or examples here.
